ops.title: bin/ab: Browserbase session-create not idempotent under curl --retry
ops.description: bin/ab create_session POSTs /sessions with curl --retry 2 and no idempotency key; a transient 5xx after Browserbase already created the session spawns duplicates. find_session picks .[0] and close releases only one, leaking the rest until keepAlive timeout. Pre-existing since ab shipped (abwc 0.10.0). Fix needs an idempotency key or a create-then-verify-single pattern. Found in the abwc 0.11.0 round-2 codex review (finding 6).

ops.text: a retried session-create cannot leave more than one live Browserbase session
close releases every session tagged to the caller
